title: Installing FIJI and SynBot (Mac Version)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"einj4","text":"Video instructions for installing FIJI and the software needed for SynBot on MacOS.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: 1:11-1:56 Download code from the SynBot GitHub repository https://github.com/Eroglu-Lab/Syn_Bot .
0:30-1:11 Give Mac permission to open FIJI since it is from an outside developer.
1:56-2:39 Move SynBot java plugins (JAR files) to the FIJI plugins folder. The ilastik4ij_Syn_Bot-1.8.2-SNAPSHOT.jar and SynQuantExtra-1.2.9.jar files are required for running SynBot.
2:39-3:00 Launch FIJI and open SynBot by dragging the SynBot.ijm file into FIJI.

3:00-3:11 Prepare your image folder. Create a folder for your experiment with subfolders for experimental groups. Each experimental group folder should contain only image files. Multiple experimental groups are not required, but your files must follow the Experiment/Group/Image structure.
3:11-4:53 Run SynBot (see the SynBot manual thresholding protocol for more information).
creator: Justin T Savage
